episodes.title: ITV Coronation Street star Emrhys Cooper's life   including Rowan actor's supportive family
episodes.description: Emrhys Cooper has joined the cast of Coronation Street, receiving support from loved ones for his role on the popular soap opera. The 39-year-old actor debuted as Rowan Cunliffe on the ITV show last month. Rowan was introduced as the host of a seminar for the Autovalent Institute, which caught the attention of Leanne Battersby (played by Jane Danson). Leanne brought her son Simon Barlow (Alex Bain) to the event, and she has since been confiding in Rowan about her past. Fans have been speculating about Rowan's motives after discovering he was recording their conversations, with hints that other residents will be drawn into the storyline.
